Welcome

This website is here to provide you with detailed information about my work as your MP and the Rother Valley constituency I am proud to represent. If you are a Rother Valley constituent and need to get in touch, you can do so by clicking here.

As the elected Member of Parliament for Rother Valley, it’s an honour to represent our communities. I am here to serve every resident and ensure your concerns and ideas are heard. My goal is to champion the needs of our towns and villages, working to improve the services and opportunities that matter most to you.

I hold appointment surgeries and frequently have street surgeries across the constituency. For more information, please visit my surgeries page by clicking here.

Thank you for your trust and engagement as we work towards a brighter future for Rother Valley.
